approval_gates.name: Sensitive-data review before model context use
approval_gates.trigger: Input includes fields blocked from model context or requiring redaction.
approval_gates.agent_allowed_action: Use approved redacted context or request data handling review
approval_gates.blocked_action_without_approval: Send sensitive or unredacted data to model context

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Analyst receives or identifies an unmatched payment record.
Analyst checks the source system for matching transaction details.
Analyst compares the record against an off-system tracking spreadsheet.
Items above the approval threshold are routed to a supervisor.
Supervisor reviews and approves or rejects the proposed resolution.

approval_gates.name: Human approval before operational write action
approval_gates.trigger: Agent recommendation would update workflow state, task assignments, customer-facing language, or system-of-record data.
approval_gates.human_reviewer: Process owner or authorized operations reviewer
approval_gates.blocked_action_without_approval: Execute write action or update system of record

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Supervisor reviews and approves or rejects the proposed resolution.

approval_gates.name: Human approval before governed workflow advancement
approval_gates.trigger: Workflow item requires supervisor, process-owner, or policy-defined approval before advancing.
approval_gates.agent_allowed_action: Draft recommendation with rationale and required evidence
approval_gates.blocked_action_without_approval: Advance the workflow item, finalize a decision, or communicate a final outcome

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Items above the approval threshold are routed to a supervisor.
Supervisor reviews and approves or rejects the proposed resolution.

escalation_rules.name: Escalate missing or conflicting source records
escalation_rules.condition: Required source information is missing, ambiguous, or conflicts with another system or workflow record.
escalation_rules.required_action: Manual review before the workflow item can be finalized.

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Analyst checks the source system for matching transaction details.

escalation_rules.name: Escalate items requiring governed approval
escalation_rules.condition: Workflow item meets a policy, supervisor-review, sensitive-data, custom-scope, or elevated-risk condition.
escalation_rules.required_action: Authorized reviewer must approve, reject, or request clarification before the workflow item advances.

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Items above the approval threshold are routed to a supervisor.
Supervisor reviews and approves or rejects the proposed resolution.
